caption:
The rain tasted like static electricity against my lips. 💦

I adjusted the high-collared nano-mesh of my suit, feeling the cool synth-fabric cling to my skin. Neon violet lights from the sector 7 server spire painted my silhouette in electric hues. They said a girl like me shouldn't be crawling through maintenance ducts, but the heat of the core was drawing power too hot for a standard rig.

My heart pounded against my ribs, syncing with the rhythm of the cyber-street below. The guard at the door was a heavy set android, his optical sensors glowing dull red. A simple wave wasn't enough. I needed to be more than just a courier.

I shifted my weight, the micro-gravity boots humming softly. I let the sheer, holographic overlay of my bodysuit slide just enough to reveal the curve of my waist, then pulled it taut as I moved closer. The sensor flickered. My skin hummed with thermal camouflage.

"Access code?" he asked, his voice a synthesized growl.

I leaned in, letting the scent of ozone and my perfume mix, close enough for him to register the warmth of my breath. "Just a glitch in the system," I whispered, pressing a data chip into his palm. His hand brushed against my fingertips, and I felt the pulse of his circuits.

We locked eyes for a second, a silent promise in the neon haze. He didn't check the chip. He just watched, mesmerized by the danger in my gaze.

I slipped through the gap before the door fully cycled. The core room was bathed in liquid gold light. I felt powerful, electric, and alive. Just another night of stealing the future for the ones who could see it.

#CyberpunkAesthetics #NeonNoir #SciFiErotica #CyberGirl #FutureFashion #NightCity #TechWear #DigitalAllure #InstaCyber #NeonNights
